name: Fifteen-Bean Crockpot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package Bean soup mix (discard the flavorin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight and drain.
2. In a crockpot, cover the beans with water.
3. Add all other ingredients except sausage to the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on high for one hour.
5. Turn to low and cook overnight.
6. Stir once or twice during cooking.
7. One hour before serving, check the texture of the soup. If too thin, mash some of the beans.
8. Add sliced Kielbasa.
9. Cook one more hour.
10. Serve with rice or bread.
